plugins.name: opspal-salesforce
plugins.description: Comprehensive Salesforce operations with 84 agents, 470 scripts, 44 commands. Features: CPQ/Q2C assessments, RevOps auditing, Flow management with Flow Scanner integration, permission orchestration, report/dashboard creation, territory management, deployment automation, Living Runbook System, hallucination prevention.

plugins.name: opspal-hubspot
plugins.description: Full HubSpot CRM operations with 44 agents, 84 scripts, 21 commands. Features: workflow automation, contact/deal management, marketing campaigns, analytics & reporting, Salesforce sync, integrations (Stripe, Commerce, CMS), Service Hub, PLG foundation, revenue intelligence.

plugins.name: opspal-core
plugins.description: OpsPal Core - Cross-platform orchestration with 43 agents. Features: Asana integration, diagram generation (Mermaid/Lucid), PDF/PPTX generation, RevOps reporting, data quality orchestration, task graph management, sales funnel diagnostics, instance management.

plugins.name: opspal-marketo
plugins.description: Marketo marketing automation with 23 agents and MCP server with 35+ native tools. Features: lead management, smart campaigns, email marketing, landing pages, forms, program architecture, comprehensive analytics with attribution and ROI, lead scoring, MQL handoff automation, email deliverability auditing.

plugins.name: opspal-gtm-planning
plugins.description: GTM Annual Planning framework with 7 agents. Features: territory design with fairness validation, quota modeling with Monte Carlo simulations, compensation planning, attribution governance, strategy planning, strategic reporting templates.

plugins.name: opspal-monday
plugins.description: Monday.com integration with 6 agents. Features: file extraction with GraphQL API client, rate limiting, exponential backoff, board management, task synchronization.

plugins.name: opspal-data-hygiene
plugins.description: Cross-platform data deduplication and hygiene with 2 agents. Features: deduplication workflows for HubSpot and Salesforce, data quality validation, cross-platform consistency.

plugins.name: opspal-ai-consult
plugins.description: Cross-model AI consultation with 1 agent. Features: multi-model consultation, AI-assisted analysis.

plugins.name: opspal-mcp-client
plugins.description: OpsPal MCP Client - Thin client plugin with 3 validation hooks and 1 resolver script for the OpsPal proprietary IP server. Ships no IP - only wiring.
